findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: remove Agent Development Use Cases (133 lines) — tutorial material belongs in agents/dev.md, not the orchestrator command; remove Example End-to-End Workflow (42 lines) — narrative duplicate of Core Workflow; consolidate Quality Standards Enforcement (23 lines) to a pointer line; remove Success Metrics (15 lines) — aspirational checklist with no execution rules; collapse Integration with /clean (11 lines) to a cross-reference. Target reduction: ~224 lines (15.5% -> ~1%). Note: ## Orchestrator Prompt Purity (MANDATORY) at line 1509 is NOT flagged — it contains enforceable rules with documented incident history. Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%) by removing similar verbose sections.
